feedItems.description: allocated £60.6m to Adult Social Care (≈£435 per resident)
allocated £13.4m to Environment & Streets (≈£96 per resident)
allocated £45.9m to Children's Social Care (≈£329 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £115 (5.0%) to £2424
